name: campus-one-main-be
description: Campus One Full Platform Backend — NestJS Monorepo

scripts.dev: concurrently --names "main,auth,institution,alumni,application,enrollment,student,profile,dashboard,grades,subjects,courses" --prefix-colors "blue,white,gray,green,red,magenta,yellow,cyan,orange,pink,purple,lime" "ts-node -r tsconfig-paths/register src/main.ts" "ts-node -r tsconfig-paths/register apps/auth-service/src/main.ts" "ts-node -r tsconfig-paths/register apps/institution-service/src/main.ts" "ts-node -r tsconfig-paths/register apps/alumni/src/main.ts" "ts-node -r tsconfig-paths/register apps/application/src/main.ts" "ts-node -r tsconfig-paths/register apps/enrollment/src/main.ts" "ts-node -r tsconfig-paths/register apps/student/src/main.ts" "ts-node -r tsconfig-paths/register apps/profile-service/src/main.ts" "ts-node -r tsconfig-paths/register apps/dashboard-service/src/main.ts" "ts-node -r tsconfig-paths/register apps/grades-service/src/main.ts" "ts-node -r tsconfig-paths/register apps/subjects-service/src/main.ts" "ts-node -r tsconfig-paths/register apps/courses-service/src/main.ts"
